name: Maple Taffy Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash apples in warm water and dry thoroughly.
2. Remove stems and insert skewers into stem ends.
3. In a deep heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the syrup, brown sugar, butter, water, and lemon juice. Over medium-high heat, bring to a rolling boil for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and prepare an ice bath by filling a large pan with cold water.
5. Quickly immerse apples into the hot syrup, twisting to coat evenly. Immediately dip them into the ice bath, then place on a greased tray.
6. Allow apples to cool completely in the refrigerator before serving.
